sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47021" key="h(mero/fwnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμερό-φωνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n47021.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">heralding the day</tr_>, epith. of the cock, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἱμερό-</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:80B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">80B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
